# Shattered War Axe
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Shattered%20War%20Axe&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Shattered War Axe
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| desc = An axe that has been shattered in the holy war enchanted by angles, yet shattered can cause quite the blow. Thanks to: Oeti.

| rof = 45
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 650
| minDmg = 500
| maxDmg = 700
| feedp = 2900
| fameb = 6

| legendary = 5

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable from The Undead Lair.|range2 = 5}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
